topic.what: Automated correction of invalid CVE-CWE mappings in the National Vulnerability Database
topic.how: Lightweight knowledge graph embeddings leveraging CVE-CWE-CPE connectivity, hierarchical relationships, and longitudinal remapping patterns without semantic features
topic.why_matters: 55% of CVEs have invalid CWE mappings causing poor root cause analysis, hindering security tools, and enabling exploitation—correct mappings improve ML model performance by 250% and could prevent exploits

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of exploited CVEs with correct CWE predicted within Top-10 ranks
characteristics.evidence: FixV2W predicts correct CWE for 69% of exploited vulnerabilities that had invalid CWEs before exploitation, validated against NVD remaps Aug 2021-Dec 2024
characteristics.context: Test set includes 99 exploited CVEs originally mapped to Discouraged/Prohibited CWEs, 95 remapped after exploit

characteristics.what_it_measures: Mean Reciprocal Rank for graph completion model predicting unseen CVE-CWE triples
characteristics.evidence: Replacing invalid mappings with Top-2 FixV2W predictions significantly improves MRR from 0.174 to 0.608 (3.5x improvement)
characteristics.context: Demonstrates FixV2W's value for improving downstream ML models relying on NVD data

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of CVEs in NVD mapped to invalid (Prohibited/Discouraged/placeholder) CWEs
characteristics.evidence: Analysis of 280,000+ CVEs as of December 2024 shows valid mappings represent fewer than half of entries
characteristics.context: Prohibited mappings: 5% of all mappings; Discouraged: 12%; placeholder CWEs like CWE-Other/CWE-noinfo: significant portion

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of CWE remaps staying within same CWE hierarchy branch
characteristics.evidence: Longitudinal analysis 2016-2024: 84% of remaps remain within same CWE branch, with 60% at most 2 hops away; maximum 4 hops via ParentOf/ChildOf

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of KEV/ExploitDB CVEs with invalid CWEs correctly predicted by FixV2W
characteristics.evidence: 190 CVEs in KEV/ExploitDB between Aug 2021-Dec 2024 had Prohibited/Discouraged CWEs; FixV2W correctly identifies root cause for 131 (69%) before exploit
characteristics.context: 134 CVEs mapped to Discouraged CWE, 56 to Prohibited; FixV2W could have identified weaknesses before exploitation

characteristics.what_it_measures: Exact match rate for combined Prohibited and Discouraged CWE correction
characteristics.evidence: 50% exact match rate on combined test set for Prohibited and Discouraged CWE mapping correction
characteristics.context: Excluding CWE-16 and CWE-264 (no members) improves to 75% coverage and 50% exact match

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of CVEs using placeholder CWEs due to CWE-1003 view not keeping pace
characteristics.evidence: CWE-1003 view (130 CWEs) finalized 2019 hasn't kept pace with 940+ total CWEs; over 25% CVEs use CWE-Other/CWE-noinfo as of 2025
characteristics.context: 70+ new CWEs added since CWE-1003 last update; 4000 remaps to CWE-noinfo between 2016-2024

good_for: correcting invalid CVE-CWE mappings in NVD
improving downstream ML models on vulnerability data
predicting CWE for CVEs with Discouraged/Prohibited mappings
detecting vulnerabilities before exploitation using root cause analysis
not_for: CVEs mapped to CWEs without members (CWE-16, CWE-264)
cases where original mapping is highly misaligned from true root cause
real-time CVE classification requiring semantic understanding
scenarios needing interpretable weakness chains for non-technical users
requires: NVD data with historical remapping history
Training data from pre-2021 remaps for validation

novelty: First large-scale longitudinal analysis of NVD CVE-CWE mappings 2016-2024
Lightweight KG embedding method without semantic features vs LLMs
Deterministic interpretable predictions using ontology structure
Demonstrates fixing NVD improves downstream ML model performance by 3.5x
Validated under open-world assumption using real-world NVD remaps
